title: Evidence Docket Composer
canonicalLine: A proof page is not a marketing page. It is a claim-bound evidence room.

sections.title: Manifest
sections.purpose: What is being claimed, by which institution, at which version, under which public/private boundary.

sections.title: Claims Matrix
sections.purpose: What is claimed, not claimed, evidence needed, status, and claim boundary.

sections.title: Source Provenance
sections.purpose: Which sources, artifacts, commits, logs, or witnesses support the claim.

sections.title: Proof Packets
sections.purpose: Trace roots, output hashes, policy decisions, signatures, costs, latency, and replay references.

sections.title: Verifier Report
sections.purpose: Validator judgments, contradictions, evaluator notes, acceptance, revision, or rejection.

sections.title: Risk Ledger
sections.purpose: Residual risk, blocked actions, safety ledger, privacy boundary, and rollback obligations.

sections.title: Replay Path
sections.purpose: How a reviewer can rerun, inspect, challenge, or falsify the evidence.

sections.title: Governed Decision State
sections.purpose: What the evidence permits now: publish, revise, quarantine, review, action, or stop.

sections.title: Chronicle Entry
sections.purpose: What gets remembered, reused, or explicitly not reused.

presets.title: Architecture claim
presets.claim: GoalOS structures autonomous AI work into proof-backed governed decision states.

presets.title: Public demo claim
presets.claim: This browser-local demo explains the GoalOS proof loop without collecting user data or authorizing external action.

presets.title: Empirical performance claim
presets.claim: The system outperforms baseline agents on a real task family.

presets.title: Settlement-readiness claim
presets.claim: A bounded unit of machine work is ready for validator review and settlement simulation.
